tasks: Optimize CI workflows (e.g., .github/workflows/build-iso.yml) or newly added tests (e.g., tests/verify_iso_size.sh) to eliminate fork/exec overhead.
Ensure native bash logic is used where possible instead of external subprocesses.
Ensure any error messages emitted by new CI validation steps are multi-line and provide actionable '💡 How to fix:' guidance to reduce developer cognitive load.
Ensure terminal output from tests is clear.
Verify that the build-time pacman.conf changes (relaxing to DatabaseOptional) do not compromise the final installed system's pacman configuration (which must remain DatabaseRequired).
